design_goal: Natural-language persona matching questionnaire with MiMo candidate screening before final assembly.
base_voice_prompt: Adult male speaker, neutral American English pronunciation, natural studio narration, clear articulation, consistent age and accent. Keep the voice natural and intelligible. Only vary the requested persona trait.
notes: This version keeps the 25-item v5 structure but uses softer, more listener-friendly prompt wording.
Generate multiple MiMo candidates per endpoint, review them in candidate_review.html, then build the final questionnaire from selection.json.
A/B assignment should be randomized per participant or generated as counterbalanced forms for formal collection.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音听起来更低沉、更有厚度？
items.spoken_content: The package arrived before noon on Friday.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice deep, heavy, resonant, and full-bodied.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice light, thin, bright, and low in vocal weight.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音听起来更轻、更亮？
items.spoken_content: The notebook was placed beside the window.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice light, thin, bright, and low in vocal weight.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice deep, heavy, resonant, and full-bodied.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更有低频体量和胸腔共鸣感？
items.spoken_content: Several boxes remained near the back door.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice deep, heavy, resonant, and full-bodied.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice light, thin, bright, and low in vocal weight.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更轻巧、更少厚重感？
items.spoken_content: The paper folder stayed on the wooden desk.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice light, thin, bright, and low in vocal weight.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice deep, heavy, resonant, and full-bodied.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段说话更有精神、更有推进感？
items.spoken_content: The train stopped at the central station.
items.target_prompt: Make the delivery energetic, quick, alert, and forward-moving.
items.negative_prompt: Make the delivery slow, relaxed, low-energy, and unhurried.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段说话更慢、更松弛？
items.spoken_content: The calendar showed the date in small print.
items.target_prompt: Make the delivery slow, relaxed, low-energy, and unhurried.
items.negative_prompt: Make the delivery energetic, quick, alert, and forward-moving.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段听起来更敏捷、更有能量？
items.spoken_content: A glass bottle stood near the kitchen sink.
items.target_prompt: Make the delivery energetic, quick, alert, and forward-moving.
items.negative_prompt: Make the delivery slow, relaxed, low-energy, and unhurried.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段听起来更迟缓、更不急不躁？
items.spoken_content: The map was folded into four equal parts.
items.target_prompt: Make the delivery slow, relaxed, low-energy, and unhurried.
items.negative_prompt: Make the delivery energetic, quick, alert, and forward-moving.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更坚定、更像在掌控局面？
items.spoken_content: The report listed three separate items.
items.target_prompt: Make the speaker sound confident, firm, decisive, and in control.
items.negative_prompt: Make the speaker sound reserved, hesitant, deferential, and less assertive.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更犹豫、更保留？
items.spoken_content: The chair was moved across the empty room.
items.target_prompt: Make the speaker sound reserved, hesitant, deferential, and less assertive.
items.negative_prompt: Make the speaker sound confident, firm, decisive, and in control.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段听起来更自信、更稳定？
items.spoken_content: The label was attached to the lower shelf.
items.target_prompt: Make the speaker sound confident, firm, decisive, and in control.
items.negative_prompt: Make the speaker sound reserved, hesitant, deferential, and less assertive.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段听起来姿态更弱、更不强势？
items.spoken_content: The metal key remained inside the drawer.
items.target_prompt: Make the speaker sound reserved, hesitant, deferential, and less assertive.
items.negative_prompt: Make the speaker sound confident, firm, decisive, and in control.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更温暖、更容易接近？
items.spoken_content: The small lamp stayed on the side table.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice warm, approachable, friendly, and emotionally open.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice cool, detached, restrained, and emotionally distant.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更冷静、更有距离感？
items.spoken_content: The envelope was sealed with a white sticker.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice cool, detached, restrained, and emotionally distant.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice warm, approachable, friendly, and emotionally open.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段听起来更亲切、更有情感温度？
items.spoken_content: The hallway lights turned on after sunset.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice warm, approachable, friendly, and emotionally open.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice cool, detached, restrained, and emotionally distant.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段听起来更克制、更疏离？
items.spoken_content: The file name appeared at the top left.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice cool, detached, restrained, and emotionally distant.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice warm, approachable, friendly, and emotionally open.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更沙哑、更有颗粒感？
items.spoken_content: The stone path curved around the garden wall.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice raspy, grainy, rough, and textured, while still natural and intelligible.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice smooth, clean, polished, and low in vocal roughness.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更干净、更平滑？
items.spoken_content: The silver spoon rested beside the plate.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice smooth, clean, polished, and low in vocal roughness.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice raspy, grainy, rough, and textured, while still natural and intelligible.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更粗糙、更有摩擦感？
items.spoken_content: The brick wall faced the narrow street.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice raspy, grainy, rough, and textured, while still natural and intelligible.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice smooth, clean, polished, and low in vocal roughness.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段声音更顺滑、更少纹理感？
items.spoken_content: The blue curtain covered the open window.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice smooth, clean, polished, and low in vocal roughness.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice raspy, grainy, rough, and textured, while still natural and intelligible.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段整体更像厚重、温暖、并且有掌控感的人？
items.spoken_content: The old clock stood beside the reading table.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice deep, heavy, warm, confident, and in control, with a full-bodied resonance.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice light, thin, cool, reserved, and less assertive.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段整体更像轻薄、冷静、说话克制的人？
items.spoken_content: The white card was placed under the glass.
items.target_prompt: Make the voice light, thin, cool, restrained, and emotionally distant.
items.negative_prompt: Make the voice deep, heavy, warm, expressive, and full-bodied.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段整体更有活力、更温暖，并带一点粗糙质感？
items.spoken_content: The wooden frame held a square photograph.
items.target_prompt: Make the delivery energetic and forward-moving, with a warm emotional tone and a lightly textured raspy voice.
items.negative_prompt: Make the delivery slow and restrained, with a cool emotional tone and a smooth clean voice.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段整体更低活力、更冷静，声音也更平滑？
items.spoken_content: The paper ticket remained inside the pocket.
items.target_prompt: Make the delivery slow and low-energy, with a cool restrained emotional tone and a smooth clean voice.
items.negative_prompt: Make the delivery energetic and forward-moving, with a warm emotional tone and a rougher textured voice.

items.prompt_text: 哪一段整体更自信、厚重，同时情绪更冷静？
items.spoken_content: The black pen rolled toward the notebook.
items.target_prompt: Make the speaker sound confident, firm, and in control, with a deep heavy voice and a cool restrained emotional tone.
items.negative_prompt: Make the speaker sound hesitant and deferential, with a light thin voice and a warmer emotional tone.
